headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Brush Off
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: SpaceX IPO Adds Second Musk Stock. It’s a Problem for Tesla
summary: (Bloomberg) -- For years, there was only one way for mom-and-pop investors to buy into Elon Musk’s vision: shares of Tesla Inc. That’s about to change — and it’s a serious risk for Tesla investors. headline: Seagate Slips as CEO Says New Factories ‘Take Too Long’
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Seagate Technology Holdings shares fell 6.9% Monday in its worst one-day drop in nearly two months after management comments at a JPMorgan conference sparked investor fears that the company won’t be able to keep up with soaring demand for memory chips. headline: Take a look at Micron stock using Yahoo Finance's AlphaSpace
summary: Yahoo Finance's AlphaSpace is a premium investment platform that combines data, charting, news, analysis, and more to help retail investors understand markets and make smart decisions faster. Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman takes a look at Micron (MU) stock using the new platform as memory names gain momentum.

headline: ServiceNow stock gains as investors push further into software
summary: ServiceNow (NOW) shares are extending their gains in this trading week, jumping by nearly 5% on Tuesday morning in a new push by software stocks. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Ines Ferré takes a closer look at why investors may be rotating out of semiconductor stocks into software. AI semiconductor giant Nvidia (NVDA) is scheduled to report first quarter earnings this Wednesday, May 20.

headline: Why the memory chip supply shortage won't hurt suppliers
summary: Wedbush Securities Managing Director of Equity Research Matt Bryson joins Julie Hyman on Market Catalysts to discuss the sell-off in memory stocks after Seagate’s (STX) CEO warned the company may not be able to meet chip demand.

headline: Stock Index Futures Slip as Tech Selloff Continues, Iran in Focus
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are down -0.38%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are down -0.65% this morning, pressured by a retreat in technology stocks, while investors await signs of progress toward a peace deal in the Middle East.
